questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'aa3e26e7-db46-4f26-a6f7-bdd92f17acac' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '24e9cf95-8569-42e1-9a5f-8e19952c99e1'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'aa3e26e7-db46-4f26-a6f7-bdd92f17acac'; delete from question_items where id = 'aa3e26e7-db46-4f26-a6f7-bdd92f17acac';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
